body: Fixes bug that was causing issues with Float32 single column NonEq runs
title: Fix NonEq effective radius bug

body: Also deletes the `ᶜspecific_env_value` for EDOnly and diagEDMF models. We should just be using the grid mean values there.
title: Add diffusion to microphysics tracers in EDOnly and diagEDMF

body:
This PR adds the sedimentation terms due to precipitation to rhoa, q_tot and other moisture tracers and enthalpy. Here are the derivation notes. 

![PXL_20250606_000906473](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bb98058c-3335-440a-81a6-76a9363585da)

TODO:
- [x] Add the terms to `h` advection
- [x] Debug snow in RICO
- [x] Test with TRMM

Next steps
- [ ] Add more `lazy` expressions. For example for the `w` of all the moisture tracers
- [x] Loop over tracers in a more concise way
- [x] Add the one missing term that is currently making the simulations unstable (or understand why we don't want it)
- [ ] Understand what terms need to be added to implicit solver
- [ ] Add additional detrainment like term to move mass from updrafts to the environment to ensure that the environmental values don't go too negative from advection. As is, right now, we don't have any means to ensure positivity in the environment while solving prognostic advection on the grid mean and updraft.

DyCOMS
[summary.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21586888/summary.pdf)

RICO
[summary.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21586854/summary.pdf)

TRMM
[summary.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/21586830/summary.pdf)
title: Add sedimentation of rhoa, q_tot and moisture tracers to edmf
